policy: Phase 2 does not consume visual content. Visual interpretation entities are not produced by this extractor; they remain owned by visual-system/ and the canonical PNG truth source. Any OEM diagram interpretation must be authored manually with a `visual-constraint` envelope.

e-flex.note: Visual-constraint emission deferred to visual-system pipeline.
